action.reasoning: Observation: Starting from scratch with no code. Need a baseline. Chose ResNet-50 (25M) as lightweight pretrained backbone, multi-GPU DDP training, 10 epochs to quickly measure iteration time and get initial accuracy. Analysis: Quickdraw DG is extremely hard (~17% top), low accuracy expected. Decision: Set up DDP training with ResNet-50, basic augmentations, cosine LR. Train 10 epochs, submit eval immediately to measure time and score.
